_comment: 5k-scale rebuild (2026-07-16): US UK CA AU IN targeted at ~5,000 clips each; CN takes all it has (~1.2k floor, Hong Kong English is the only GLOBE CN source). GLOBE speakers are the real lever: at cap<=15 the big-5 averaged ~7 clips/speaker (heavy right-skew, whales rarely sampled), so reaching 5,000 needs ~700 GLOBE speakers/class, not more clips/speaker. globe_speakers_per_gender raised 100->380 (=760/class), clips/speaker 15->20. IN is speaker-limited (only 540 GLOBE speakers exist) so it lands lower (~4k); imbalance absorbed by macro-F1 + class weighting in training. Hybrid label axis unchanged (region classes -> SAA country, CN(L2) -> SAA native_language).

globe_accents: India and South Asia (India, Pakistan, Sri Lanka)
